text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I did some training on my own during my break.
I'll share the data with you later.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list:
I was just wondering if you managed to get
some rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Admire Vega had a fulfilling day
off.
